仕事をしていると、開けっぱなしの窓の外から何やら音が聞こえてきた。<br>何事か:
I was working when I heard a sound from outside the open window. I
turned to see what it was—
はい、エレクトラでございます、ご主人様。<br>本日も夜遅くまでのお仕事、お疲れ:
Yes, I am Electra, Master. Thank you for working so late again
tonight.
あ、ああ……それはいいんだが……飛んで来ずに、<br>普通にドアから入ってきてく:
Ah, yeah... that's fine, but... couldn't you just come through the door
normally? It startles me...
失礼いたしました。<br>急ぎここへ来る必要がありましたので。: My apologies. I needed to come here urgently.
最近、司令官が無理をしてばっかりで、体調が心配なんです。<br>意地を張ってない:
Lately, the Commander's been pushing himself way too hard! I'm
worried about his health! I wish he'd stop being stubborn and get some sleep!
なるほど……それは確かに心配ね……: I see... that certainly is worrying...
最近、司令官君があまり寝てないらしいんです。<br>いろいろ考えることもあるので:
It seems the Commander hasn't been sleeping much lately. He must
have a lot on his mind, but I'd like him to sleep even if we force him.
（考えすぎて眠れない→考えることをやめさせる→<br>考える余裕もないほど疲れさ:
Cannot sleep from thinking too much → make him stop thinking →
exhaust him so he cannot even think → sleep soundly!
というわけで、エレクトラがご奉仕することでご主人様を疲労させ、<br>強制的に睡:
And so, I have resolved to exhaust you with my service and force you
to get some sleep.
なんだ、その連想ゲームは！？<br>導いた解決方法も脳筋すぎるぞ！！:
What's with that word association game! And the solution you came
up with is way too muscleheaded!
そもそも無理をしている俺のことが心配なんだろ？<br>なのに、さらに無理矢理疲れ:
First of all, you're worried about me overworking, right? So how does
it make sense to force me to exhaust myself even more just to sleep?
どうもこうもありません。<br>すべてはご主人様のお身体を思えばこそです。:
It is not a matter of 'how.' It is all because I care about your health,
Master.
ご主人様……エレクトラのご奉仕を受けてくださいませ……<br>そして、そのままグ:
Master... please receive Electra's service... and then let us sleep
soundly...
トーンを抑えた甘く囁くような蠱惑的な声は、<br>耳からスルリと入ってきて、疲れ:
Her voice, sweet and seductive in a hushed whisper, slipped into my
ear and numbed my tired brain.
そのままエレクトラの唇が近づいてくるが――: Then Electra's lips drew closer, but—
奉仕をしてくれるのは構わん。<br>俺も無理をしている自覚はあるから、素直にそれ:
I don't mind you serving me. I'm aware I've been pushing myself too
hard, so I'll accept it.
しかし、前回のようにやられるのは癪だ。<br>今回は最初から俺のやりたいようにや:
But it's annoying to get screwed like last time. This time, I'm going to
do things my way from the start...!
そう言って自分からエレクトラの身体を抱きしめ、唇を貪った。: Having said that, he took Electra in his arms and devoured her lips.
エレクトラの顔が蕩け、一気に女の表情になる。<br>それは彼女がこちらの提案を受:
Electra's face melted, and she instantly took on a womanly
expression. That was proof that she had accepted his proposal.
